HGSS.134.0000:
Did you know?
They are constructing a Safari Zone\r
just around the corner.\f
They say it’ll be really fun!
You will see many different kinds of\r
Pokémon, and it’s all you can catch!\f
There is no reason not to go, right?
I’m so looking forward to the\r
Safari Zone!\f
Finish the construction already!
HGSS.134.0001:
Did you know? There’s a Safari Zone
just around the corner.\f
It’s really fun!
You will see many different kinds of\r
Pokémon, and it’s all you can catch!\f
There is no reason not to go, right?
Just around the corner.\f
It won’t take too long.
Why don’t you drop by? Won’t you? [0200,0000]
HGSS.134.0002:
All right!
It’s just over there.\f
Go up the stairs, and you’ll be outside.
Then it’s only a few paces away!
HGSS.134.0003: It’s such a good deal, you know?
HGSS.134.0004:
See? The Safari Zone was fun?
No need to say anything!\r
Your face says it was really fun!
HGSS.134.0005:
What?
You want to go to the Safari Zone, too?\f
It’s still under construction.
Please come back later.
HGSS.134.0006:
I appreciate that everybody is looking
forward to it. But the lady at the\r
reception seems a bit too dramatic...\r
Don’t get your expectations too high!
HGSS.134.0007:
Chuck: Hey, [0103,0000,0000]!
Good to see you again! But I never\r
expected to see you around here.\f
Could it be...that you are on the way
to the Embedded Tower?\f
The Embedded Tower is a huge tower
piercing the sky.\f
It is said to have something to do with
the mythical Pokémon that stretched\r
the seas and that Pokémon that widened\r
the lands.\f
But the tower no longer is standing.\f
HGSS.134.0008:
Chuck: The way to the Embedded Tower
is harder than you can imagine.\f
You need to use Rock Climb
as well as Surf.\f
HGSS.134.0009:
Chuck: I see! So you’ve defeated all
the Gym Leaders in Kanto as well!\f
Then there’s nothing to worry about.
Believe in yourself and walk your path.\f
Yahaha!\f
HGSS.134.0010:
Everything Is Thrilling!
Explore to Find Wild Pokémon!\f
Warden Baoba’s Safari Zone
Coming Soon!
HGSS.134.0011:
Everything Is Thrilling!
Explore to Find Wild Pokémon!\f
Warden Baoba’s Safari Zone
Up and Running!
